title: An EVA Musical
wikitext:
[]: An EVA Musical             Quote Post by pat457 » Fri Nov 28, 2008 8:44 am I was kind of thinking. If EVA is made into a musical, what songs could be fitted in, so to speak? The thing that sparked this idea is, oddly, watching Godspell. I started imagining the following while watching this scene : (Rei absorbs Gendo's right arm) GENDO: Oh God, I'm bleeding Oh God, I'm bleeding Rei: Oh God, you're bleeding (Rei merges with Lilith and becomes more gigantic; Gendo meanwhile falls down on the floor while EVA-01 appears out of nowhere and picks him up) GENDO: Oh damn, I'm dying LILITH/Rei: Oh damn, you're dying GENDO: Oh damn, I'm dying (Rei I, Rei II, and Rei III appear; Gendo is still in the grasp of EVA-01, with a look of fear on his face) GENDO: Oh crap, I'm dead REIs: Oh crap, you're dead Oh crap, you're dead You're dead (Gendo gets chowed down by EVA-01; the three Reis carry up Gendo's remaining body parts and start to walk around NERV HQ in procession) REIs: Long live Gendo Long live Gendo Long live Gendo Long live Gendo (A multitude of Reis then appear, joining the small procession) REIs: Long live Gendo Long live Gendo Long live Gendo Long live Gendo (The crowd of REIs suddenly appear in what appears to be a crowded city, still carrying Gendo's legs while people walk on the streets doing their daily work, not noticing the blue-haired girls passing by) REIs: Long live Gendo (Prepare ye the way of Gendo) Long live Gendo Long live Gendo (Prepare ye the way of Gendo) Long live Gendo Long live Gendo (Prepare ye the way of Gendo) Long live Gendo Long live Gendo (Prepare ye the way of Gendo) Long live Gendo Prepare ye the way of Gendo Prepare ye the way of Gendo Day by day, Day by day, Oh Gendo, three things I'll say: You're such a bully Who mistreat Shinji! Can't you speak more clearly Day by Day (As the Reis turn into a corner, all the people turn into tang, leaving the streets deserted, save for puddles of LCL and empty clothes) REIs + VOICES: Day by day, Day by day, Oh Gendo, three things I'll say: You're such a bully Who mistreat Shinji! Can't you speak more clearly Day by Day...

[]:             Quote Post by Holy Diver » Fri Nov 28, 2008 12:33 pm I would like to think that the medium of musical theater is too upbeat for the general tone of Eva. As for songs, you could do "If I Were a Rich Man" from Fiddler on the Roof and change the words around so it could be about Shinji whining about how his life sucks.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Nov 28, 2008 3:35 pm Holy Diver wrote: I would like to think that the medium of musical theater is too upbeat for the general tone of Eva.

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Fri Nov 28, 2008 3:38 pm I'm sure someone's proposed this before. But it's no less a good idea.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Nov 28, 2008 3:59 pm master_lloyd wrote: I'm sure someone's proposed this before.

[]:             Quote Post by jim_loves_randy » Fri Nov 28, 2008 6:50 pm You guys must be high.

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Fri Nov 28, 2008 7:53 pm This idea has excellent "Gilligan's Island" potential.

[]:             Quote Post by pat457 » Fri Dec 12, 2008 9:34 pm jim_loves_randy wrote: You guys must be high.

[]:             Quote Post by Synapsid » Sat Dec 13, 2008 9:45 pm They could always make Eva into a Rock opera! (preferably one utilising Queen) Shinji: I'm just a poor boy, nobody loves me

[]:             Quote Post by pat457 » Sun Dec 14, 2008 9:13 am Synapsid wrote: They could always make Eva into a Rock opera! (preferably one utilising Queen) Shinji: I'm just a poor boy, nobody loves me

[]:             Quote Post by Sharaz Destler » Sun Dec 14, 2008 1:29 pm ...Nightwish?????

[]:             Quote Post by Holy Diver » Sun Dec 14, 2008 2:04 pm Im currently writing a song to be sung by Shinji set to the tune of "If I Were a Rich Man" from Fiddler on the Roof. It is to be titled "Life Can Be a Bitch Man" and I hope to have it completed by tomorrow.

[]:             Quote Post by mrpanda » Sun Dec 14, 2008 2:21 pm Sharaz Destler wrote: ...Nightwish?????

[]:             Quote Post by pat457 » Sun Dec 14, 2008 6:19 pm mrpanda wrote: I say bah humbug to this idea.

[]:             Quote Post by Synapsid » Mon Dec 15, 2008 5:31 pm pat457 wrote: Now that could always be done (God forbid though that someone come up with the idea of using...Linkin Park ).

[]:             Quote Post by TheAyanamiOtaku » Mon Dec 15, 2008 6:11 pm We could fuse Evangelion with Chicago...

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Dec 15, 2008 7:22 pm I think this would be awesome if done right. Oh, and an Evangelion AMV about Queen using Shinji as the singer has already been done (as well as in Redeath. ^^; ).

[]:             Quote Post by Synapsid » Tue Dec 16, 2008 1:09 am ^ I all ready knew about Opus and Redeath, but head banging Zerogouki, and Bob Dole just had to be brought into the picture. I could certainly see EVA fuzzed with Chicago's Play and Musical versions.

[]:             Quote Post by pat457 » Wed Dec 24, 2008 10:37 pm Synapsid wrote: Well, EvaMonkey considered "Faithless" to be an excellent AMV.

[]:             Quote Post by Nasmoe » Wed Dec 24, 2008 10:49 pm ^ so would the musical be better if it were played for laughs or a serious drama type thing?
